mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pw_prize (prize_id, prize_type, prize_name, prize_content, total_quantity, remaining_quantity, win_rate) VALUES (#{prizeId}, #{prizeType}, #{prizeName}, #{prizeContent}, #{totalQuantity}, #{remainingQuantity}, #{winRate})
mapper.update: UPDATE pw_prize SET prize_type = #{prizeType}, prize_name = #{prizeName}, prize_content = #{prizeContent}, total_quantity = #{totalQuantity}, remaining_quantity = #{remainingQuantity}, win_rate = #{winRate} WHERE prize_id = #{prizeId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM pw_prize p INNER JOIN pw_policy_prize pp ON p.prize_id = pp.prize_id INNER JOIN pw_draw_policy dp ON pp.policy_id = dp.policy_id INNER JOIN pw_campaign c ON c.policy_id = dp.policy_id WHERE c.campaign_id = #{campaignId} ORDER BY pp.win_rate DESC
SELECT * FROM pw_prize ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE pw_prize SET remaining_quantity = remaining_quantity - 1 WHERE prize_id = #{prizeId} AND remaining_quantity > 0
UPDATE pw_prize SET remaining_quantity = #{quantity} WHERE prize_id = #{prizeId}
